# Robots.txt for Gani Properties
# Optimized for search engines and AI crawlers

# Allow all search engines
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /properties/new
Disallow: /properties/edit/

# Allow AI crawlers (ChatGPT, Google AI, etc.)
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

# Crawl-delay for respectful crawling
Crawl-delay: 1

# Host
Host: https://ourganiproperties.com

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://ourganiproperties.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://ourganiproperties.com/sitemap-properties.xml
